name_en: 游댠 Small Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag游눤Puzzle outlines a rectangular shape with unique geometric lines游꾸This small version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim-style details游눎Geometric Bag 24CM Puzzle Handbag, original imported calfskin smooth grain游냝游냝 Luo Family Bestseller Geometric Bag游녶Puzzle Handbag is the first tote bag launched by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for LOEWE游떁The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines游녵This small size version is made of soft grain calfskin*Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses游돘Crossbody, shoulder, clutch or top handle carry*Removable游꾸
